title: Round Bars
description: Supernova Steel India is a reliable stockist and supplier of ferrous and non-ferrous round bars, including stainless steel, alloy steel, carbon steel, nickel alloys, aluminium, copper, brass, bronze, titanium, and other special metals.
longDescription: We offer a comprehensive range of sizes, grades, and surface finishes to meet the diverse requirements of various industries. Our materials are sourced from reputed manufacturers such as Tata Steel, Mukand Ltd., Viraj Profiles, JSW Steel, SAIL, Vizag Steel, Jindal Aluminium, Hindalco, NALCO, Hindustan Copper, Vedanta Group, and other approved domestic & international mills. With strong inventory management and ready stock, we ensure fast delivery, consistent quality, and competitive pricing. All materials are supplied with full quality assurance and Mill Test Certificates (MTC).

specifications.value: EN, DIN, JIS, ASTM, BS, ASME, AISI
Black, Bright Polished, Rough Turned, No.4 Finish, Matt Finish, BA Finish
Round, Square, Hex (A/F), Rectangle, Billet, Forging

rows: ASTM B1, B2, B3, B124, B133

title: Pipes and Tubes
description: Reliable supplier and stockist of Carbon Steel, Stainless Steel, and Alloy Pipes in Seamless and Welded constructions.
longDescription: Manufactured in accordance with Indian (IS), ASTM, ASME, API, and BS standards. Our pipes are known for high strength, dimensional accuracy, and long service life, making them suitable for pressure, structural, and fluid transmission applications. We supply API Line Pipes in both Seamless and Welded (ERW / LSAW / SSAW) forms for oil, gas, and water transmission pipelines.

subCategories.name: Carbon Steel Pipes
subCategories.description: Seamless (superior strength, for critical/high-temp use) and Welded (ERW/EFW/SAW for structural/medium-pressure use).

subCategories.name: Stainless Steel Pipes
subCategories.description: Engineered for corrosion resistance, superior mechanical strength, and long-term operational safety. Available in Seamless, Welded, ERW, EFW.

title: Angle
description: Essential structural steel products used across construction, engineering, and industrial sectors.
longDescription: Manufactured using high-quality raw materials, our Steel Angles deliver excellent strength, durability, and dimensional accuracy. We supply Steel Angles in a wide range of sizes, grades, and specifications, meeting both national and international standards.

title: Flanges

longDescription: We maintain ready stock of Weld Neck, Slip-On, Socket Weld, Lap Joint, and Blind Flanges. Trusted stockist, supplier, and exporter serving domestic and international markets.

title: Butt Weld Pipe Fittings
description: Preferred solution for critical piping systems ensuring uniform flow and zero leakage.
longDescription: By forming a fully welded joint, these fittings deliver exceptional strength, even in extreme pressure and temperature conditions. Leading stockist serving oil & gas, petrochemical, power, and process industries.
